title: hieracium maculatum subsp. astictum
intro: Hieracium maculatum subsp. astictum, also known as spotted hawk's beard, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium maculatum subsp. astictum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Hieracium maculatum subsp. astictum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
